Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

What is your favourite George Harrison Song?

Social · asked by user [] · 2010-03-11 · 3 answers
Give me Love!
[p]
[youtube]7spYZhXCzaQ[/youtube][/p]

[p]Give me love
Give me love
Give me peace on earth
Give me light
Give me life
Keep me free from birth
Give me hope
Help me cope, with this heavy load
Trying to, touch and reach you with,
Heart and soul

Om m m m m m m m m m m m m m
M m m my lord . . .

Please take hold of my hand, that
I might understand you

Wont you please
Oh wont you

Give me love
Give me love
Give me peace on earth
Give me light
Give me life
Keep me free from birth
Give me hope
Help me cope, with this heavy load
Trying to, touch and reach you with,
Heart and soul

Om m m m m m m m m m m m m m
M m m my lord . . .

Please take hold of my hand, that
I might understand you[/p]
user [154] · 2010-03-11
Black album Hare Krishna kirtan and [br]
[youtube]X7eFQMakhDE[/youtube]
user [265] · 2010-03-11
My sweet Lord
While my guitar gently weeps
user [638] · 2010-09-25
"Govindam Adi-purusha", with Prabhupadas singing in background
